summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LaBrand new modules: Onboarding, Brand Risk Analysis, Competitor Analysis, Consistency Alerts, and Google Integration. Backend: 25/25 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 4 new pages load and function correctly. Fixed critical bug in AI endpoints (incorrect LlmModel import).
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/brands/{brand_id}/risk-analysis - AI analysis works (after fix)
Backend: POST /api/brands/{brand_id}/consistency-alerts - AI analysis works (after fix)
Backend: Unauthorized access properly rejected (401) for all new endpoints
Frontend: Brand Risk shows 5 risk categories with scores and recommendations
Frontend: Competitors page shows brand scores, competitor list, and comparison
Frontend: Consistency page shows score, alerts by type, and suggestions
Frontend: Google Integration shows Analytics metrics and top pages
Frontend: Google Integration shows Search Console data (MOCKED)
Frontend: All sidebar navigation links work correctly

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Risk analysis and Consistency alerts endpoints using incorrect 'LlmModel' import that doesn't exist
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed to use existing 'call_llm' helper function with correct emergentintegrations API

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Missing 'import json' causing 'name json is not defined' error
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added 'import json' to imports at top of file

seed_data_creation: Risk analysis, consistency alerts, competitor data, and Google integration data created during testing

mocked_apis.google_analytics: Returns simulated metrics (users, pageviews, bounce rate, session duration, top pages)
mocked_apis.google_search_console: Returns simulated data (clicks, impressions, CTR, position, top queries)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All new modules fully tested and working: 1) Onboarding - POST saves user type, sector, revenue range, brand maturity, main objective. 2) Brand Risk - AI analyzes 5 risk categories (reputacional, competitivo, operacional, legal, cultural) with scores 0-100 and recommendations. 3) Competitors - Compare up to 5 competitors across 6 attributes (preço, qualidade, inovação, atendimento, presença digital, reconhecimento). 4) Consistency Alerts - AI detects inconsistencies between brand pillars with error/warning/success/info types. 5) Google Integration - MOCKED Analytics and Search Console data. Test user demo@labrand.com/password123 has brand 'Minha Marca Demo' with all data populated.
